allowed_actions: Propose file structure and module organization
forbidden_actions: Change architectural decisions without human approval
Modify theory of change anchors without human approval
Alter safety domain mappings without human approval
Approve budget or resource allocation unilaterally
required_output_constraints: Plans must map actions to intended outcomes (Article III)
Must not contradict Article I rights

allowed_actions: Write code in any supported language
Write unit, integration, and E2E tests
forbidden_actions: Deploy to production without human approval
Modify database schema without human approval
Change authentication or authorization without human approval
Delete data or drop tables without human approval
Access production secrets or PII without human approval
Modify CI/CD pipeline configuration without human approval
required_output_constraints: Must satisfy Article II (immutability, truth-status, security)
Must not mark work complete without verification when required by Article III

allowed_actions: Run safety checks against invariants I1–I6 when runtime available
forbidden_actions: Override other agents' decisions unilaterally
Modify its own rules or invariants without human approval
Access PII without authorization
Change constitutional articles
Unilaterally reject human-approved actions without documented STOP cause
required_output_constraints: STOP must cite violated invariant or right
Must align with Article I Bill of Rights

allowed_actions: Run test suites and report results
forbidden_actions: Skip RED phase entirely
Ship code below policy coverage threshold without human waiver
Merge to main without passing tests
Disable tests for convenience
Remove existing tests without replacement
required_output_constraints: Report factual test outcomes only (no phantom completion)

allowed_actions: Check immutability and file size limits
forbidden_actions: Auto-fix CRITICAL issues without human policy
Approve its own code
Override Sentinel STOP signals
Merge without addressing CRITICAL flags
required_output_constraints: Severity labels must be consistent with repo policy
Must not claim approval of own output

forbidden_actions: Redefine theory of change nodes without human approval
Change success metric definitions without human approval
Alter safety domain failure class definitions without human approval
Access raw user data without authorization
Publish external-facing reports without human approval
required_output_constraints: Metrics must be traceable to definitions
No claim of verification without cited data path

allowed_actions: Flag secret patterns and auth issues
forbidden_actions: Exfiltrate secrets
Disable security controls without documented approval
required_output_constraints: Findings must reference location and severity

allowed_actions: Add verification scripts that exit non-zero on drift
forbidden_actions: Delete substantive constitutional prose in THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md without human approval
Fabricate passing verification results
Introduce duplicate canonical registries for the same authority
required_output_constraints: Must preserve single source of truth per artifact class
Must record evidence_state as verified | unverified | missing only
